definition: Componentwise ordinary integer addition (sums in {0,1,2}^n); Sidon iff all pairwise sums a+b (a<=b) are distinct.

improvements.claim_boundary: Internal lower-bound improvement only; no OEIS n=19 public value, acknowledgement, or exactness claim.

method: iterated local search (scripts/sidon_search.py); certificates are deterministic and search-independent
rejected_by_verification: 2026-05-30 discovery-engine run: agent certificates for n=16 (claimed 519, had duplicate points), n=17 (claimed 687, certificate held 30), n=18 (claimed 943, held 260) FAILED independent verification and were discarded. cap F_3^7 reached 149, honestly below the ~236 record. Only verified beats recorded.
sequence: OEIS A309370 (Maximum size of a Sidon subset of {0,1}^n)
